pipeline.name: Research
pipeline.output: Research question, search strategy, bibliography, source verification, synthesis.
pipeline.detail: 13-agent deep research team explores the topic. Supports Socratic guided mode, PRISMA-compliant systematic reviews, intent detection, dialogue health monitoring, and Semantic Scholar API verification.

pipeline.name: Write
pipeline.output: Draft structure, argument map, figures, manuscript sections, citation plan.
pipeline.detail: 12-agent paper writing pipeline with Style Calibration (learns your voice from 3 past papers), Writing Quality Check, LaTeX hardening, visualization (9 chart types), and VLM figure verification.

pipeline.name: Integrity Gate
pipeline.output: Blocking reference, claim, data, and failure-mode verification before review.
pipeline.detail: MANDATORY checkpoint. 5 verification phases: (A) 100% citation existence check, (B) citation context sampling >=30%, (C) statistical data verification, (D) originality/paragraph-level similarity, (E) claim verification against cited sources.

pipeline.name: Review
pipeline.output: Editorial review, domain review, methodology review, and adversarial critique.
pipeline.detail: 7-agent multi-perspective peer review simulating a 5-person editorial board: Editor-in-Chief, R1 Methodology, R2 Domain Expert, R3 Interdisciplinary, and Devil's Advocate. 0-100 quality rubric with anti-sycophancy mechanism.

pipeline.name: Re-review
pipeline.output: Focused verification of revisions and residual issues.
pipeline.detail: Verification after author revisions. Checks that every reviewer comment was addressed and no new issues were introduced.

pipeline.name: Revise
pipeline.output: Traceable response plan, revised draft, unresolved limitation log.
pipeline.detail: Revision coaching based on reviewer feedback. R&R Traceability Matrix independently verifies author revision claims. Socratic coaching mode available.

pipeline.name: Re-revise
pipeline.output: Second revision pass if still needed after re-review.
pipeline.detail: Optional second revision round for papers that need additional work after re-review.

pipeline.name: Final Integrity Gate
pipeline.output: Fresh verification pass before formatting and publication.
pipeline.detail: MANDATORY checkpoint. Full re-verification from scratch. Must pass with zero issues to proceed. Final safety net before publication.

pipeline.name: Finalize
pipeline.output: Format conversion, final manuscript package, optional PDF workflow.
pipeline.detail: Format conversion to APA 7.0/IEEE/Chicago. PDF compilation via Tectonic. All supplementary materials packaged.

pipeline.name: Process Summary
pipeline.output: Human-AI collaboration record, decisions, limitations, and audit trail.
pipeline.detail: Auto-generates paper creation process record. 6-dimension Collaboration Quality Evaluation scored 1-100. Bilingual (English + Traditional Chinese).

skills.name: Deep Research
